headline: Ethisphere Names ADM as One of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies for 7th Year in a Row
summary: CHICAGO, March 18, 2026--ADM (NYSE:ADM), a global leader in innovative solutions from nature, has been recognized as one of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices.
